visits.note: Patient presents with complaints of fatigue and polyuria. Physical examination reveals obesity and hypertension. HbA1c is 7.2, BP 140/90, eGFR 72. Diagnoses include Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, and Hyperlipidemia. Medications include Metformin 500mg bid and Lisinopril 10mg daily.

Patient returns with complaint of worsening edema and shortness of breath. Physical examination reveals weight gain and decreased eGFR. HbA1c is 7.5, BP 150/95, eGFR 60. Diagnoses include Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Hyperlipidemia, and Chronic Kidney Disease. Medications include Metformin 500mg bid, Lisinopril 20mg daily, and Simvastatin 20mg daily.

Patient returns with complaint of worsening chest pain and palpitations. Physical examination reveals new-onset atrial fibrillation. HbA1c is 8.0, BP 155/100, eGFR 50. Diagnoses include Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Hyperlipidemia, Chronic Kidney Disease, and Coronary Artery Disease. Medications include Metformin 1000mg bid, Lisinopril 30mg daily, Simvastatin 40mg daily, and Apixaban 5mg bid.

Patient returns with complaint of worsening weakness and anemia. Physical examination reveals anemia and decreased eGFR. HbA1c is 8.5, BP 160/105, eGFR 45. Diagnoses include Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Hyperlipidemia, Chronic Kidney Disease, Coronary Artery Disease, and Anemia. Medications include Metformin 1500mg bid, Lisinopril 40mg daily, Simvastatin 60mg daily, Apixaban 10mg bid, and Epoietin alfa 5000 units qw.
